banner.message: We use cookies for a better experience.

modal.title: Your Cookie Preferences
modal.descriptionBeforePolicy: We use cookies to improve your experience on this website. You may choose which types of cookies to allow and change your preferences at any time. Disabling cookies may impact your experience on this website. You can learn more by viewing our

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: Cookies required to enable basic website functionality.

performance.title: Performance Cookies
performance.description: Cookies used to understand how the website is being used.

preference.title: Preference Cookies
preference.description: Cookies that are used to enhance the functionality of the website.

advertising.title: Advertising Cookies
advertising.description: Cookies used to deliver advertising that is more relevant to your interests.
